title: biophytum aeschynomenifolia
intro: Biophytum aeschynomenifolia, also known as Indian spinach or daun ginseng, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also consumed raw in salads or used as a vegetable in various dishes.
